title: Download Provider System
constants_and_registries: FILE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDER_CONFIG_DIRS: frozen object — maps provider name → config dir string. Entries: cursor→'.cursor', claude-code→'.claude', gemini→'.gemini', codex→'.codex', agents→'.agents', kiro→'.kiro', opencode→'.opencode', pi→'.pi'

classes.name: DownloadProvidersRegistry
classes.notes: Pure data module; no class/function declarations — only exported frozen constants

classes.name: FileDownloadHandler
methods: onRequestGet(context): Promise<Response> — validates type ('skill'|'command'), provider (FILE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS), id (VALID_ID); resolves configDir from FILE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDER_CONFIG_DIRS; fetches /_data/dist/{provider}/{configDir}/skills/{id}/SKILL.md from ASSETS; returns octet-stream with Content-Disposition attachment filename SKILL.md; Cache-Control s-maxage=86400

classes.name: BundleDownloadHandler
methods: onRequestGet(context): Promise<Response> — validates provider (BUNDLE_DOWNLOAD_PROVIDERS); fetches /_data/dist/{provider}.zip from ASSETS; sanitizes provider name (alphanumeric+._-); returns application/zip with filename impeccable-style-{safeProvider}.zip; Cache-Control s-maxage=86400

key_relationships: Both handlers use context.env.ASSETS (Cloudflare asset binding) for file fetching
important_notes: All constants are Object.freeze(). Both handlers are Cloudflare Pages Functions (export onRequestGet). Type param in file download accepts only 'skill' or 'command' but path always resolves to skills/ directory. Cache headers: public, s-maxage=86400, stale-while-revalidate=3600.
